title: RBI Issues Draft Directions for ‘Trade Receivables Discounting System’
description: Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) play an important role in the economic fabric of the country. MSMEs face constraints in obtaining adequate finance, particularly in terms of their ability to convert their trade receivables into liquid funds.  In order to address this issue the Reserve Bank of India has, over time, issued guidelines regarding setting up of Trade Receivables Discounting System (TReDS) platforms in the country for facilitating financing of trade receivables of MSME
